name: GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw)
description: Official GitHub tool that allows AI agents to execute automated tasks within GitHub Actions using natural language/Markdown instead of YAML. Features include issue triage, PR code review, CI/CD failure analysis, and documentation maintenance with sandboxed execution and read-only default permissions.
community_quotes: Trending top AI Agent open-source project on GitHub
Simplifies workflow automation using natural language instead of YAML
Strong security boundaries with default read-only permissions and sandboxed execution

name: JetBrains Junie AI Coding Agent
description: AI coding agent from JetBrains that executes complex tasks including writing code, debugging, running applications, writing tests, and verifying results. Now publicly available to all JetBrains customers with support for IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, PyCharm Pro, WebStorm, and GoLand.
community_quotes: Now publicly available to all JetBrains customers
Can execute complex multi-step tasks including coding, debugging, and testing
Achieved 53.6% task completion on SWE-Bench Verified benchmark

name: JetBrains AI Free Tier
description: New free tier from JetBrains offering unlimited code completion, access to local AI models, and credit-based cloud AI assistance with 30 days of AI Pro access. All JetBrains AI tools are now available through a single subscription starting from the 2025.1 version.
community_quotes: All JetBrains AI tools now available through a single subscription
Unlimited code completion with local AI models
Included in all IDE licenses with 30 days of AI Pro access

name: Entire.dev
description: Open-source platform by former GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke for managing AI-generated code. Features context storage and checkpoints in GitHub repos, Supabase synchronization, and semantic layer enabling human developers and AI agents to reason and collaborate in parallel. Raised $60M seed at $300M valuation.
community_quotes: Largest seed round ever for a developer tool startup ($60M)
Founded by Thomas Dohmke, former GitHub CEO
Enables parallel collaboration between human developers and AI agents
